title: 7 Biblical Checks For Unanswered Prayer
hook: Before you quit praying—run your request through these 7 biblical checks.
script: Before you quit praying—run your request through these 7 biblical checks. God’s love isn’t on trial; our expectations are. First, motive: is it for God’s glory or just my comfort? James 4:3. Timing: He makes everything beautiful in its time, Ecclesiastes 3:11. Alignment with His will, 1 John 5:14. Perseverance: keep asking, Luke 18:1–8. Unconfessed sin closes the door, Psalm 66:18. Relational repair matters, Matthew 5:23–24. And sometimes God’s answer is different and better, Ephesians 3:20. Breathe and pray: Father, search my motives, align me to Your will, cleanse me, heal my relationships, grow my endurance, and do more than I imagine—in Your time. Amen.

title: When Heaven Feels Silent: A Gentle Prayer Diagnostic
hook: If God feels silent right now, watch this.
script: If God feels silent right now, watch this. Silence isn’t rejection; sometimes it’s redirection. Do a gentle heart scan with God. Ask: Is my motive loving or self-serving? James 4:3. Am I demanding my timing, or trusting His? Ecclesiastes 3:11. Does this request agree with His will? 1 John 5:14. Have I stopped asking too soon? Luke 18:1–8. Is there sin to confess, Psalm 66:18, or a relationship to repair, Matthew 5:23–24? And could His “no” be a better “yes”? Ephesians 3:20. Now pray with me: Jesus, I surrender outcomes and timelines. Purify my heart, restore my connections, strengthen my persistence, and surprise me with Your best. Amen.

title: Unanswered Doesn’t Mean Unloved: The No‑Shame Prayer Check
hook: You need to hear this today: unanswered doesn’t mean unloved.
script: You need to hear this today: unanswered doesn’t mean unloved. When prayers stall, don’t shame yourself—slow down and diagnose. God’s love isn’t on trial; our expectations are. Run seven quick checks: motive, timing, alignment with God’s will, perseverance, confession, reconciliation, and openness to a different or better answer. Whisper them as you pray: Lord, purify my motive, align me to Your will, set me to Your time, give me endurance, cleanse my heart, help me make things right, and do far more than I ask. Save this as your one‑page prayer diagnostic, then keep praying with hope. The Father hears you, and He’s working even now.
